headlines.title: Spencer Pratt says he doesn’t need ‘anyone’s endorsement’ after Trump backs L.A. mayor bid
headlines.description: Former reality TV star and Los Angeles mayoral candidate Spencer Pratt rebuffed a potential endorsement from President Donald Trump, telling NBC News on Thursday, “I don’t need anyone’s endorsement but mothers’.

headlines.title: Indicted terrorist commander allegedly spoke of wanting to target Ivanka Trump
headlines.description: The commander of a terrorist organization is alleged to have discussed wanting to target Ivanka Trump, President Donald Trump’s oldest daughter, as part of a series of attacks, according to three sources familiar with the matter

headlines.title: Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer says she won’t run for president in 2028 — and then walks it back
headlines.description: Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer said she doesn’t plan to run for president in 2028, rebuffing assumptions that she would join a crowded Democratic primary field.

headlines.title: Artists bail on D.C. bash for America’s 250th birthday after being listed on the lineup
headlines.description: Four musical artists listed as performers at a National Mall event in Washington, including Martina McBride and The Commodores, said they won’t be attending despite being listed on the lineup.

headlines.title: Illinois representative talks bill that would regulate AI companies
headlines.description: The Illinois House of Representatives passed a bill that would set a new standard for regulating America’s leading AI companies if Gov. JB Pritzker signs it. NBC News' Gadi Schwartz talks to Rep. Daniel Didech about what the bill entails.

headlines.title: The history of entertainers running for office in California
headlines.description: Inspired to run for office after wildfires destroyed his Los Angeles home, Spencer Pratt's mayoral candidacy is polarizing voters and providing endless fodder for late night talk shows. But while politics in general might feel like a reality television show these days, Pratt is actually just the latest in a long list of entertainers who court the California electorate.

headlines.title: L.A. mayoral candidate Spencer Pratt says he doesn’t ‘need anyone’s endorsement’
headlines.description: Former reality TV star Spencer Pratt sat down with NBC News’ Tom Llamas to talk about the Los Angeles wildfires that destroyed many homes including his, his past work in entertainment, and his mayoral bid against current Mayor Karen Bass and other candidates.

headlines.title: Vance calls Pope Leo’s AI warnings ‘profound’
headlines.description: Vance said in an interview with NBC News he is glad the pope tackled AI. He also discussed why X remains off his phone after he deleted it for Lent.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: DOJ opens criminal probe involving E. Jean Carroll testimony in Trump sexual abuse lawsuit
headlines.description: The Justice Department has opened a criminal investigation involving E. Jean Carroll’s lawsuits over her sexual abuse allegations against President Donald Trump, according to two sources familiar with the matter

headlines.title: Trump administration prepares for proposed $250 bill with the president’s face on it
headlines.description: The Treasury Department is preparing to print $250 bills with President Donald Trump’s face on them and is just waiting for Congress’ green light, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Thursday

headlines.title: Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett’s home targeted in apparent swatting incident
headlines.description: An apparent “swatting” incident targeted Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett’s home Wednesday night, police in Virginia said Thursday.
